channel.title: Pedro Sleeps
channel.description: A short private podcast series about helping Pedro fall asleep earlier and more calmly.
channel.itunes:author: Carla for Bernardo
channel.itunes:summary: A short private podcast series about bedtime routines, sleep pressure, night returns, fear of the dark, rewards, setbacks, siblings, and sleep upgrades.

item.title: 01. The invisible mistake
item.description: He is in bed at 9, but only falls asleep at 10.
item.itunes:summary: He is in bed at 9, but only falls asleep at 10.

item.title: 02. The calm staircase
item.description: A predictable evening routine, visual chart, night pass, and chair method.
item.itunes:summary: A predictable evening routine, visual chart, night pass, and chair method.

item.title: 03. The eleven-thirty return
item.description: What to do when Pedro appears in the parents’ room at night.
item.itunes:summary: What to do when Pedro appears in the parents’ room at night.

item.title: 04. Taming the dark
item.description: Validating fear without feeding it, night lights, guardians, and check-ins.
item.itunes:summary: Validating fear without feeding it, night lights, guardians, and check-ins.

item.title: 05. From bribes to pride
item.description: Using rewards carefully, then fading them into confidence and pride.
item.itunes:summary: Using rewards carefully, then fading them into confidence and pride.

item.title: 06. When it gets difficult
item.description: Setbacks, illness, parent shifts, realistic timelines, and red flags.
item.itunes:summary: Setbacks, illness, parent shifts, realistic timelines, and red flags.

item.title: 07. Two kids, one room
item.description: How to approach eventual room sharing without making siblings rivals.
item.itunes:summary: How to approach eventual room sharing without making siblings rivals.

item.title: 08. The top-bunk fort
item.description: Using exciting sleep upgrades safely without making them a bribe.
item.itunes:summary: Using exciting sleep upgrades safely without making them a bribe.
